justification: O paper apresenta um sistema neurosymbolic onde o LLM é explicitamente um componente de SUPORTE (pré-processamento), não um agente agentic. A Seção I.INTRODUCTION (parágrafo 2) descreve: 'LLM to convert natural language input into JSON representation → JSON used to create symbolic problem in ASP → Clingo solver extracts all possible service-to-cluster solutions.' A Seção IV (EXPERIMENTAL EVALUATION) testa separadamente 'LLM Intent Translation' vs 'ASP experiment', confirmando que o LLM traduz intenção natural para estruturado, mas o ASP solver (Clingo) toma as decisões de placement. O LLM NÃO participa do loop de decisão autônoma; ele apenas pré-processa entrada. Este é unambiguamente o padrão excluso 'LLM supports other method'.
divergence_reason: Categoria regex 'D_devops_or_logs_not_rm' é imprecisa. O paper NÃO é DevOps/logging (não há incident triage, log summarization, RCA, ou IaC). O padrão real é 'LLM-support-to-symbolic-solver': LLM faz intent translation (NL → JSON), ASP faz placement decisions. Classificação corrigida: H_llm_supports_other_method (suporte a método simbólico).

evidence.architectural_pattern: Neurosymbolic: two-stage pipeline (LLM intent translation → ASP solver), not agentic loop.
evidence.infrastructure_coupling: ASP solver drives placement decisions; LLM is pre-processor, no closed-loop control.
evidence.rm_decision_class: Service-to-cluster placement decided by ASP Clingo solver, not by LLM.
evidence.reasoning_process: LLM: prompt-based NL-to-JSON conversion. ASP: symbolic constraint solving. These are decoupled components.
evidence.grounding: Intent specification (natural language) → symbolic facts; no continuous telemetry or feedback loop.
evidence.evaluation: Separate experiments: LLM translation accuracy vs ASP solver optimality; no unified agentic loop evaluation.
evidence.key_quote: I.Introduction(2): 'LLM to convert natural language input into JSON representation → JSON used to create symbolic problem in ASP → Clingo solver extracts all possible service-to-cluster solutions.'

notes: System demonstrates clear LLM-support pattern (LLM preprocessor → ASP solver). LLM is not an agentic driver; it provides utility function (NL interpretation). Regex classifier categorized as 'DevOps/logs' which misses the actual structure; corrected to 'LLM supports symbolic method'. Weighted score 0.32 < threshold 0.55. Exclusion confirmed.
